data.title: BitMEX is about to launch XBTJ25 futures trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMEX will launch XBTJ25 futures trading at 12:00 (UT+8) on February 25, supporting up to 100 times leverage and 75 XBT risk limit. Trading will end on April 25, 2025.

data.title: QCP: Risk reversal trades indicate increased market expectations for ETH’s March decline
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News QCP Capital posted on its official channel that the recent Bybit hack resulted in the theft of approximately $1.4 billion in Ethereum (ETH), however, despite the incident occurring only two days later, the price and implied volatility of the digital currency market barely reacted. This price behavior highlights the growing maturity of the crypto market since the FTX crash in 2022, especially in the crypto credit market. 
Bybit's ability to quickly obtain bridge loans to fill liquidity gaps during critical periods highlights the resilience of the lending space and the ample available liquidity. Since 2022, the industry has steadily recovered and experienced a sharp surge before the U.S. presidential election last year. 
All aspects of the crypto industry - from custody and security solutions to corporate governance and transparency - have been strengthened in every crisis. In fact, Bybit was able to withstand more than $6 billion in withdrawals after experiencing the largest crypto heist to date, an event that can be seen as a manifestation of confidence in the trading platform rather than a setback. 
ETH remained relatively stable as Bybit bought over the weekend. However, now that the liquidity gap has narrowed, risk reversal trades indicate that market expectations for ETH to fall in March have increased. Meanwhile, the Lazarus Group, a hacker group allegedly linked to North Korea, now holds 0.42% of the ETH supply, becoming the 14th largest ETH holder.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based GODS perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1 to 20 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched the U-based GODS perpetual contract with a maximum leverage of 20 times. Contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: El Salvador Pauses Daily Bitcoin Purchases
data.description:
In September 2021, El Salvador began its Bitcoin experiment. It adopted Bitcoin as legal tender. In 2022 the country started to buy 1 $BTC per day. President Bukele had plans for this. He wants to keep doing this until $BTC ‘becomes unaffordable’ with fiat. The International Monetary Fund (IMF) was skeptic from day one about […]
The post El Salvador Pauses Daily Bitcoin Purchases appeared...
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/el-salvador-pauses-daily-bitcoin-purchases/

data.title: Greeks.live: Community members are cautiously bearish in the short term, focusing on BTC's support level at $95,200
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live macro researcher Adam released a community briefing on the X platform, saying that community members are cautiously bearish in the short term, but still maintain a bullish view in the long term, and expect the market to fluctuate in the near future. The price range of focus is $90,000-100,000, especially the $95,200 support level. Some traders expect that it may rise to the $80,000-90,000 range in the long term. Traders actively sell call options around $99,000 and maintain bearish positions based on expectations of a volatile market; the community has noticed that the current volatility is extremely low, with the volatility of this week's expiring contracts at 44%, and believes that the current volatility is underestimated. Many traders implement range trading in the $90,000-100,000 range.

data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.19T, up by 0.56% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $95,078 and $96,500 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $96,020, down by -0.30%.

data.title: Market Volatility Expected Amid Cautious Sentiment
data.description: According to PANews, Greeks.live macro researcher Adam shared insights on the X platform, indicating that community members hold a cautious short-term bearish outlook, while maintaining a long-term bullish perspective. The market is anticipated to experience fluctuations, with a key focus on the price range of $90,000 to $100,000, particularly the $95,200 support level. Some traders predict a potential long-term rise to the $80,000 to $90,000 range. Traders are actively selling call options near $99,000 and are maintaining bearish positions based on expectations of a volatile market. The community has observed extremely low current volatility, with this week's expiring contract volatility at 44%, suggesting that the current volatility is underestimated.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 96,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.32% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 24, 2025, 09:28 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 96,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 96,000.007813 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.32% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bybit CEO: We have returned to 1:1 rigid redemption and will soon launch a website to track the flow of stolen funds
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bybit CEO Ben Zhou said in a community AMA that he has obtained the latest asset proof audit report, which will be updated on the official website soon. Bybit has returned to 1:1 rigid redemption, and Bybit's capital inflow in the past 24 hours ranks first among global CEXs. Bybit will launch a website on the flow of stolen funds, and will simultaneously update data such as the progress of recovery. Users who provide effective clues will receive a bounty. The new section of the Bybit New Coin Announcement column regularly publishes the performance and financial reports of the online projects, covering 5 dimensions: core financial data, token indicators, on-chain activities and network health, governance and community, as well as risk disclosure and future roadmaps.

data.title: In the past 2 hours, 7 newly created wallets deposited 116.62 million BAN to CEX, and the sale will lose $5.63 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to The Data Nerd's monitoring, in the past 2 hours, 7 newly-created wallets deposited 116.62 million BAN into Gate, with a value of approximately US$10.44 million, accounting for 11.66% of the total supply. These tokens were purchased two days ago at an average entry price of US$0.133. If all are sold at the current price, a loss of approximately US$5.63 million will occur.
